/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/Physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/renderer2d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/shader_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/UI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o app   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -lSDL3 -lGL
